      cat(tabular:::.render_typst_doc(grid), sep = "\n")

      #set page(

        flipped: true,
        margin: 1in,

      #set text(font: ("Courier New", "Courier", "Liberation Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono",), size: 10pt)

        columns: (2.9833in, 1.0667in, 1.0667in, 1.0667in, 1.15in,),
